name: Pizza with Mixed Seafood
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Vegetable oil (preferably safflower or canola)
2 stems broccoli, washed and separated into small florets; peeled and sliced stems
2 teaspoons chopped fresh oregano (or 3/4 teaspoon dried oregano)
1 (8 ounce) package reduced fat cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a medium-sized frying pan, heat oil over medium heat.
3. Saute broccoli, mushrooms, and onion for 5 minutes.
4. Add oregano and cilantro; cook for an additional minute.
5. Remove from heat and stir in milk and softened cream cheese until smooth.
6. Arrange seafood (clams and tiny shrimp) on the pizza crust.
7. Spoon vegetable mixture over the top of the seafood.
8. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper to taste.
9. Bake for 20 minutes or until the toppings are lightly browned and the underside of the crust is deep brown.
10. Cut into 8 slices.
